programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: In Dorset, Alex Polizzi helps James and Yvonne, the owners of the Coach and Horses. They are struggling to attract business, despite it being the only pub in the village. Alex is instantly shocked at the first impression of the Coach, its rooms and also its owners, but can she get their business back on track?

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious
programme.desc: A look at the business of high-end hospitality, going behind the scenes at the Kempinski Adlon in Berlin, where guests want the best food, decor, and out-of-this world service. Staff are put through their paces by hotel manager Carsten Seubert as he strives to provide the very best for their wealthy clientele, with former guests including the Queen, Barack Obama and Brad Pitt

programme.title: The Murder of Sarah Payne: A Mother's Story
programme.desc: Documentary shedding light on the emotional fallout of the murder of Sarah Payne, the eight-year-old girl who was kidnapped and killed in Kingston Gorse, West Sussex in 2000. Two weeks after her disappearance, Sarah's body was found, and after a high-profile police investigation, Roy Whiting was convicted of her murder and sentenced to life imprisonment. Testimonies from friends, family, police officers, key witnesses and experts in criminology are combined with an interview with Sarah's mother, to illustrate the tragic toll the case took on those closest to the victim

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and criminology experts analyse the crimes of cinema entrepreneur Peter Moore, who brutally murdered four men in Wales in 1995

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of medical emergency teams in the A&E department of Barnsley Hospital

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain with Chris Tarrant
programme.desc: The broadcaster examines how trains and the rail network transformed the nation and shaped modern Britain

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Art historian Tim Marlow profiles influential painter JMW Turner, who divided the critics with his rapid brush-strokes, treatment of light and tendency toward abstraction, but is now hailed as one of the great British artists

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of dedicated volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Animation for younger viewers following the adventures of the cheeky piglet, her brother George and their friends

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Animated action adventure following a squad of six heroic puppies and their tech-savvy 10-year-old leader as they protect the community of Adventure Bay

programme.title: Hell Below Zero (1954)
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking explorer joins a whaling ship and is persuaded by the female captain to investigate the disappearance of her father on an earlier expedition. The pair become suspicious of her former lover - and are proved right when he leaves them for dead in Antarctic waters. Action adventure, starring Alan Ladd, Joan Tetzel, Basil Sydney and Stanley Baker

programme.title: At Gunpoint (1955)
programme.desc: A peaceable shopkeeper becomes a local hero when he accidentally kills the leader of a gang of bank robbers. However, when the dead bandit's partners in crime come looking for retribution, he finds the friends and neighbours who praised his bravery are now about to abandon him. Western, starring Fred MacMurray, Dorothy Malone and Walter Brennan

programme.title: The Stranger (1946)
programme.desc: A war crimes investigator is on the trail of an infamous Nazi. Drama, directed by and starring Orson Welles, with Loretta Young and Edward G Robinson

programme.title: Stalag 17 (1953)
programme.desc: The inmates of a German PoW camp are convinced there is a traitor in their midst when the guards seem to be forewarned of their escape attempts. An unassuming sergeant content to remain a captive until the end of the conflict becomes the focus of suspicion as mob mentality takes hold. Billy Wilder's Second World War drama, starring an Oscar-winning William Holden, with Don Taylor, Otto Preminger and Harvey Lembeck

programme.title: Wonder (2017)
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy with facial disfigurements that have so far required almost 30 operations takes on a whole new challenge when, after being home educated his entire life, enters mainstream school for the first time. As he struggles to fit in, his fellow pupils and the community are forced to learn the power of compassion and acceptance. Julia Roberts, Owen Wilson and Jacob Tremblay star in Stephen Chbosky's drama, based on the best-selling novel by RJ Palacio

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets (2017)
programme.desc: When a dark force threatens a vast metropolis, special operatives Valerian and Laureline must race to identify the menace and protect the future of the universe. Luc Besson's epic sci-fi adventure, starring Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne and Clive Owen

programme.title: T2 Trainspotting (2017)
programme.desc: Recovering heroin addict Mark Renton returns to his Edinburgh roots after 20 years living overseas, hoping to make peace with the friends he abandoned. However, starting anew proves far from easy, especially when old partner in crime Begbie escapes from prison, still brooding on Renton's betrayal. Danny Boyle's drama sequel, starring Ewan McGregor, Robert Carlyle, Ewen Bremner and Jonny Lee Miller

programme.title: Learning to Drive (2014)
programme.desc: A New York book critic and her Sikh driving instructor find themselves helping each other to overcome their respective relationship difficulties. Romantic drama, starring Patricia Clarkson and Ben Kingsley

programme.title: 49th Parallel (1941)
programme.desc: Six Nazis are left stranded in Canada after their U-boat is sunk. As they try to escape the attentions of the authorities, they struggle to win sympathy among the locals. But when that fails, they decide to flee to the still-neutral USA instead. Michael Powell's Oscar-winning Second World War thriller, starring Anton Walbrook, Leslie Howard, Laurence Olivier, Glynis Johns and Niall MacGinnis

programme.title: El Dorado (1966)
programme.desc: An ageing gunfighter is drawn into the conflict between a land-grabbing cattle baron and a ranching family, but gets wounded in the process. A year later, he returns to town to find the situation has not improved - so along with his sidekick and the drunken town sheriff, he fights to defend the family from its enemies. Western, starring John Wayne, Robert Mitchum, James Caan and Ed Asner

programme.title: Mary, Queen of Scots (1971)
programme.desc: Historical biopic about the life and loves of the ill-fated 16th-century monarch, whose opposition to her cousin Elizabeth I led to her downfall and execution. Starring Vanessa Redgrave, Glenda Jackson, Timothy Dalton, Patrick McGoohan, Nigel Davenport and Ian Holm

programme.title: Transcendence (2014)
programme.desc: A scientist working to develop artificial intelligence is assassinated, but his death provides the breakthrough he and his colleagues needed, as his own mind is uploaded into a computer system. Granted extraordinary knowledge, he begins planning to change the world for the better - with potentially horrific consequences for the human race. Sci-fi drama, starring Johnny Depp, Rebecca Hall and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: The Shape of Water (2017)
programme.desc: Elisa Esposito is a mute singleton who lives above a cinema. Although friends with Giles, a neighbouring artist, she lives a lonely existence. While he has designs on the cafe worker nearby, Elisa cleans up at top-secret government lab, a bus ride away in Baltimore, Maryland. One day in 1962, she makes a life-changing discovery when Elisa finds an amphibious humanoid creature who is being held captive, and they embark on an extraordinary relationship. Guillermo del Toro's Oscar and Bafta-winning fantasy, starring Sally Hawkins, Michael Shannon, Octavia Spencer and Doug Jones

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk (2008)
programme.desc: A bungled experiment causes a scientist to turn into a monster whenever he gets angry. He travels the world seeking a cure for his condition, while a ruthless general is determined to capture him and use the creature as a weapon. However, one of the soldiers under the officer's command undergoes a terrifying transformation of his own. Comic-book adventure, starring Edward Norton, Liv Tyler, Tim Roth and William Hurt

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun (2015)
programme.desc: A rancher returns home badly wounded following a confrontation with a gang of outlaws. His wife realises the bandits will soon come looking for him, and is forced into an uneasy alliance with her former lover to defend her home and family from attack. Western, starring Natalie Portman and Ewan McGregor

programme.title: Apache Uprising (1965)
programme.desc: Western, starring Rory Calhoun as a tough-talking cowboy with a heart of gold who bravely defends fellow stagecoach passengers from a potentially lethal Indian attack. Also starring Corinne Calvet, Lon Chaney Jnr and John Russell

programme.title: My Man Godfrey (1936)
programme.desc: A spoiled aristocratic woman hires a tramp as her butler, little anticipating how valuable he will prove _ or what effect his charms will have on her. Classic comedy, starring William Powell, Carole Lombard and Alice Brady

programme.title: Two Rode Together (1961)
programme.desc: The desperate relatives of people captured by Comanches many years before put pressure on the US military to bring them home. The army hires a cynical frontier marshal, who agrees to negotiate their release in return for a commission. But the townsfolk are forced to face some grim truths when he returns with just one unrecognisable captive. John Ford's Western, with James Stewart, Richard Widmark and Shirley Jones

programme.title: The Ladykillers (1955)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind and his gang come up with a cunning scheme to steal a fortune, but their plan is threatened by the unsuspecting elderly landlady of the boarding house they are staying in. They decide to dispose of her, which proves easier said than done. Classic Ealing comedy, with Alec Guinness, Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Katie Johnson, Cecil Parker, Danny Green and Jack Warner

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1 (2014)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen is brought to a secretive underground society following the destruction of the televised deathmatch. She becomes the figurehead of a revolution against the despotic Panem regime, while her friend Peeta remains a captive of its tyrannical president. Part one of the two-part conclusion to the sci-fi adventure series, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Philip Seymour Hoffman, Julianne Moore and Donald Sutherland

programme.title: Days of the Bagnold Summer (2019)
programme.desc: Daniel, a heavy metal-loving teenager, is forced to spend the summer with his boring old mum. Comedy, starring Earl Cave, Monica Dolan, Tamsin Greig and Rob Brydon. The directorial debut of Simon Bird, best known as one of the stars of The Inbetweeners and Friday Night Dinner

programme.title: Frances Ha (2012)
programme.desc: A woman leads a merrily directionless life in New York, sharing an apartment with an old friend and working as an apprentice at a dance school. When her flatmate moves away, she tries to remain upbeat while making a difficult transition from living like a student to being a responsible adult. Comedy drama, starring Greta Gerwig and Mickey Sumner

programme.title: Mistress America (2015)
programme.desc: A lonely student finds her first year at university in New York a disappointing experience, with uninspiring studies and no social life. Everything changes when her mother remarries and she acquires a new stepsister, whose bizarre schemes draw her into the kind of lifestyle she had always dreamed of - and provide fresh creative inspiration. Comedy, starring Lola Kirke and Greta Gerwig

programme.title: Another Country (1984)
programme.desc: A homosexual pupil at a top public school in the 1930s turns to communism and defects to Russia to escape the oppressive nature of British society. Drama, adapted from the West End play based on the life of spy Guy Burgess, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Anna Massey and Michael Jenn

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eatery's failings. Their 78-year-old mother Inge desperate for Nino to turn the business around, but the feuding family members will have to solve their differences first

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Danny wear elf suits on their quest to find a particular Christmas gift for Emma, while Riley and Tucker help Bonnie plan a seasonal celebration. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau and Tahj Mowry

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Riley try to make the difficult transition from friends to being a couple, which leads to an embarrassing moment for Riley. Elsewhere, Tucker helps Danny to get over his failed relationship. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is less than thrilled when her honeymoon to Tahiti is cancelled because she has broken her leg, so Joe surprises her with a romantic getaway to a lakeside cabin. However, things go awry and their dream holiday quickly becomes a nightmare. Lennox is unsure about whether to continue her new relationship with Marco and tries to keep it a secret. Comedy, with Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe refuses to allow Dani out on a date with a boy from school, so she tricks Mel into taking her along instead. Lennox and Marco's relationship is revealed when they run into Zander, and a new rivalry erupts between the two men over an internship with an artist

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny bond as they miss Leonard, and Howard tries to help Raj get over his break-up with Lucy. Meanwhile, Bernadette and Amy visit an out-of-town biology convention. Comedy about four high-achieving scientists, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard returns from his research expedition in the North Sea and undergoes an adjustment period with Sheldon. Howard experiences an unusual emotional reaction as a result of his relationship with his mother. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray fall out over Barry's plan to perform his martial arts routine at the annual high school talent show. Pops buys Erica an electric guitar, urging her to take to the stage and sing. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly complains that Pops is spending too much time with her at home, so Murray takes him to work at the furniture shop. Meanwhile, Adam reluctantly gives away his old toys in an effort to make him look more grown up, hoping it will result in a kiss with Dana. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Captain Holt clash over the merits of Holt's newly hired assistant. Jeffords, Santiago, Diaz and Boyle attempt to do something about the cluttered and dirty communal office space at the 99th precinct

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago investigate a difficult 'he said, she said' case. Captain Holt becomes suspicious that a cunning escape from jail has taken place after discovering that his lifelong criminal arch-nemesis has died in a prison transport accident

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard has a meeting with Colonel Williams, a representative from the Air Force Department of Material Command, about the gyroscope he invented with Leonard and Sheldon. Penny accidentally reveals that Bernadette is pregnant to their colleagues at work. Dean Norris guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions rise when the guys struggle to complete their Air Force project on time and are forced to work around the clock - leaving Sheldon fighting to stay awake. Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makis's reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret

First broadcast in February 2016

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty-year-old virgin Josh hopes to find a fairy-tale princess to remove his innocence, while twentysomething Manchester couple Matt and Mary are interested in exploring the possibilities of polyamory and finding a third person to join their relationship. However, with two people doing the picking, will they ever be able to agree on who to date?

programme.title: First Dates

Call centre worker Zoe, 21, is looking for an intelligent and ladylike bookworm and sits down for a meal with Grace, a well-read 22-year-old physics student with a penchant for grammatical correctness, and HR adviser Leah, 34, is matched with 37-year-old blue-eyed boy Andy from Middlesbrough

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

programme.desc: The competition begins at Grove Barn B&B in Denton, Norfolk, where owners Steph and Alan Flight hope that their approach to cleanliness will lead to good feedback from their guests

programme.desc: The second episode comes from Picaroons in Sheringham, Norfolk, where problems with the plumbing and a disastrous breakfast lead to harsh words between the hosts and their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Brightham House in Malborough, Devon, where couple Scott Browning and Alastair Veness hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Moran's B&B in Westward Ho!, Devon, owned by ultra-chic retirees John and Jaqueline, although the lack of an en-suite does not impress Christine and Ian

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out how much they've been paid and to settle some scores. Grove Barn owners Steph and Alan have some hair-raising issues up for discussion after the cleaning critique they received

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate detectives try to find the relatives of a south London woman, but they are misled by a trail of dubious clues and are left questioning their knowledge. Meanwhile, research into family trees reveals the lives of British soldiers in 19th-century India

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The Rothschild's giraffes are expecting a new addition as 12-year-old matriarch Dagmar, whose last calf died after a few days, goes into labour after a 15-month pregnancy. Orang-utan sisters Tuti and Siska, and their baby cousin Kesuma, rebuild their relationship after the trauma of the fire that engulfed their habitat in December 2018, while the keepers set off in pursuit when a blue-throated macaw goes on the run

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie gets green-fingered as she sets out to restore the chateau's original greenhouse, which has recently been damaged in a storm. Lee and Belinda continue to expand their new outdoor venue. When their first wedding falls through, they fortunately get a new booking for a 60th birthday, but then end up in a race against time to get the garden party ready. With 12 acres of land to enjoy, Dick and Angel make sure their Wellington boots have a home, creating bootjacks for the newly renovated boot room

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Stephen Yeoman and Anita Findlay, who want to build a cutting-edge, post-industrial house covered in rusty metal. However, their prominent riverside plot in the traditional and architecturally conservative area of South Downs means everyone will be watching. The project proves to be a real rollercoaster when the fitting of the rusty steel cladding goes wrong, cash flow problems threaten to bring work to a halt, and the couple announce that a baby is on the way

programme.title: Coroner
programme.desc: As Jenny conducts her first inquest into a police shooting, McAvoy is forced to ask some tough questions. Drama, starring Serinda Swan, Alli Chung and Roger Cross

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 78-year-old man has difficulty breathing after breaking several ribs by tripping over a kerb, and doctors discover that a woman is in the latter stages of pancreatic cancer when they treat her for sepsis. Elsewhere, a 32-year-old woman is treated after bruising her neck and face when she slipped on wet decking on a night out with friends

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with David Mitchell and Cariad Lloyd taking on Jon Richardson and Russell Howard. Sam Simmons joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Coroner
programme.desc: As Jenny conducts her first inquest into a police shooting, McAvoy is forced to ask some tough questions. Drama, starring Serinda Swan, Alli Chung and Roger Cross

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called to a custody suite in Birmingham to deal with a prisoner who is aggressive and abusive but may have overdosed on heroin. Paramedic Rob Moore and student paramedic Ally Shipway tread a fine line between looking after him and themselves. At the same time, across the city, paramedics Jo Hardwick and Peter Bowles are called to a man who is found unconscious at the roadside

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

Kate Quilton investigates what actually goes into sodium-replacement salts and examines whether salt really deserves its unhealthy reputation

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May build their own stretch limousines out of other vehicles and use them to transport celebrities to the Brit Awards. Meanwhile, a Ford Mustang is put through its paces, and actress Billie Piper is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef embarks on another round of extended culinary breaks, visiting markets, restaurants, wineries, cafes and bars, beginning with Portuguese capital Lisbon. The culinary effects of Portugal's historic explorations are still seen in its dishes with hints of cinnamon and freshly chopped coriander from the east and tomatoes and chillies from the Americas. Rick is inspired to cook salt cod fritters and an almond tart, before heading for the St Anthony's Day Parade and Sardine Festival

programme.desc: The chef heads to the north-eastern Greek city of Thessaloniki, which nestles on the northern shores of the Aegean Sea. Rick explores a city of many identities, boasting a young student population apparently hungry for dishes that reflect the freshest of seafood. Back home, he prepares veal and aubergine stew after meeting the doyenne of Greek cooking, Vafa Alexiadou

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef visits Palermo in northern Sicily, a city echoing Arab, North African, French, Spanish and Italian influences, making its cuisine unique and irresistible. Pine nuts, raisins, almonds and golden breadcrumbs are combined with flavours of sun-ripened tomatoes, lemons and the finest olive oil to create a range of unforgettable dishes. Rick witnesses locals celebrating a festival in honour of Palermo's patron saint Rosalia, and receives a cookery lesson from a real-life duchess. At home he cooks Marsala chicken, a Sicilian classic served in UK bistros since the 1960s

programme.title: Scrapyard Supercar

programme.desc: Nicholas Day explores the case of Edith Thompson, who conspired with her lover to murder her husband in 1922 - a story that inspired Alfred Hitchcock

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: A serial killer who terrorised London in 1942, using the chaos of the Blitz as an opportunity to attack women

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The life of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity, having witnessed Jesus' death and resurrection

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The Three Gorges Dam, built across China's Yangtze river, which is the largest and heaviest concrete structure ever built, housing the world's largest power station

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The Millau Viaduct in South West France, which is the tallest bridge in the world and stretches two and a half kilometres over one of Europe's deepest valleys

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his early 20th century Bradshaw's Guide, Michael Portillo sets off on the first leg of a trip through Britain's industrial heartlands in the footsteps of George V, beginning by travelling from Warrington to Preston

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Blackburn, Michael Portillo catches a rare glimpse of Edwardian life on celluloid and marvels at how factory workers and schoolchildren alike were drawn to seek fame on film. Continuing east to Nelson, Michael braves the enemy camp to have a pint of tea with the socialist working classes in Britain's last Clarion House

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Minehead Railway Station, where items brought in for the experts to value include a chair thought to have once belonged to Henry VIII, a 19th-century washing machine, a holiday camp dance trophy, a miniature of Napoleon and a wedding dress that has been worn down the aisle by seven brides

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: Staff cope with the pressure of rush hour during the summer, with Lorel Kinghorn trying to get a group of rowdy schoolchildren safely on board a train without causing major delays on the line. There is a chance to find out what happens during the routine weekly maintenance, and Network Rail's Steve Hawkins and Emma Taylor take to the air as part of their commitment to preserve some of the most historic parts of the railway

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1971 Mercedes SL and a 1989 Jaguar XJS emerge from a barn on a chicken farm, a Roller and a Rover go under the hammer and a 1966 Triumph Spitfire is restored to near perfection

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A settlement in Argentina destroyed by floods, a town in the US that has been erased, and a Soviet dream-town that turned into a nuclear nightmare

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: The events of 1944, when the death toll rose substantially. By this point, the Allies were aware of Auschwitz's purpose, and faced a difficult decision over what should be done about it. Plus, the story of the occupation of Hungary, revealing how Adolf Eichmann offered to spare a million Jews in return for certain services

programme.title: True Evil: The Making of a Nazi

programme.desc: In south Wales, an abandoned convent is demolished, in Lancashire copper products are recycled and in Yorkshire an artist uses scrap for his latest project

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike Brewer tries to track down the first-ever Bond car, a 1963 Sunbeam Alpine. He finds a rust-free, race-ready motor, but Edd China discovers some surprises in the engine bay

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: After a five-month shutdown put a huge strain on the business, the pressure is on for the bushland gold miners, and solo prospector Rick Fishers joins the hunt

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: At a stately home in Staffordshire, Drew Pritchard uncovers a hidden 19th-century gem that its owners were oblivious to. In the Lake District, he digs out some of Britain's mining past

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers: Dream Car
programme.desc: Car dealer Mike Brewer and mechanic Marc Priestley help police officer Deepak trade up his Nissan Juke to a stylish Porsche Cayenne

programme.title: Speed Is the New Black
programme.desc: A hockey-mad family want their '57 Nomad to be a mighty ride for everyday use and full-throttle track days. A father and son restyle their 1967 Mustang

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How to blow the world's finest crystal, make the slimmest TVs, heat the deepest swimming pool, and fill a million bottles a day of the world's favourite ketchup

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How a set of jaws are forged, capable of chomping through concrete and demolish tower blocks. Plus, the ways an historic airman's bomber jacket can be stiched, and the means of brewing the oldest beer in the Western world

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike Brewer finds a Humvee to work on, and he and Edd China create a four-wheel-drive camping vehicle capable of venturing to places no camper has been before

programme.title: Speed Is the New Black
programme.desc: Noah's lead fabricator Scott lets loose on a 1962 Chrysler 300. The end result is a completely custom aviation-themed high-performance hot rod

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: Paul Teutul Sr asks JQ and Jason Phol to build a tribute bike for the Sikorsky Aircraft Corp, but fabrication issues cause problems

programme.title: Supertruckers
programme.desc: Steve, Sharpie and Andy take on Metcalfe's biggest ever job moving three massive oil rig sections. Simon and Paul bite off more than they can chew in a dockside move

programme.title: Mega Shippers
programme.desc: Marine officer Gary Olden clears a path in Southampton for the Mathilde. At 400 metres and carrying almost 18,000 containers, it is the biggest ship ever to dock at the port

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: How everyday items such as tequila, waterbeds and flip flops are manufactured

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The manufacture of dragsters, salsa and water-pumping windmills

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Old Orleton Inn in Wellington, Shropshire, where an award-winning breakfast is on offer - but a lack of showers does not go down well

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, married couple Victoria and Andrew kick off with an Italian-themed menu. This divides girlfriends Ciara and Carley, while Terri and husband David aren't keen on the couples' decision to invite a gospel choir to perform. Day two sees fitness-loving Ciara and Carley cooking up a healthy, clean-eating menu. However, Victoria and Andrew are left feeling worse for wear after a game of smoothie pong involving sprout juice, and Terri is less than pleased with the sportswear dress code. Finally, it's retro-loving Terri and David's chance to bring back the '70s to try to bag the grand

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman meets Kent couple Alison and Lee, who are making a permanent move with their four dogs to the countryside of Albox in Almería, and have a £150,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps find a suitable property for Mark and Wendy Lang, a couple from Liverpool with a £90,000 budget who want to start a new life on Spain's Costa Almeria

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Presenter Sara Damergi helps Chris Grandison and his grandmother Patricia Blythe search for a holiday home in Malta. Patricia and her late husband lived on the island many years ago when he served in the Armed Forces, and her grandson hopes to find a property with rental potential on a budget of £70,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Healthcare worker Bev Stewart hosts the first round of the dinner party challenge in Keighley, West Yorkshire, opting for a schooldays-themed evening featuring fish fingers, meat and potato pie, and jelly and ice-cream. However, her choice fails to impress hair salon owner Rebecca, computer network engineer Adam, sales adviser Philomena and business owner Charlie

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Computer engineer Adam Bolam-Peel hosts the second party in Keighley, West Yorkshire, and plans plenty of surprises - including Northumbrian pipe playing and a poetry session. However, picky guest Philomena finds fault with his cluttered house, while Charlie cannot resist goading Rebecca about her teeth

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Image-conscious salon owner Rebecca Saunders knows she is not a great cook, and hopes her entertainment will make up for that as she hosts the competition in Keighley, West Yorkshire. She gives mock makeovers to the guests, and they are all surprised by Adam's transformation

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sales adviser Philomena Golenya hosts the penultimate dinner party in Keighley, West Yorkshire, and tries to impress her guests by writing her four-course menu in Italian. However, a broken chair and a small fire in the kitchen threaten to derail proceedings, until her Italian dancing proves to be a hit with one of the guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business owner Charlie Walker hosts the final dinner party in Keighley, West Yorkshire, and hopes to impress his guests with a 'stylish with swimwear' dress code and hot-tub disco, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppi's in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgia's constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Anna designs and produces her own wallpaper for the girls' bedrooms. Iain and Kate continue the search for their dream chateau, finding a gem that is not yet on the market

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sarah from Wiltshire fell in love with Bulgaria 30 years ago when she was working as a teacher, and now she can't wait to buy a holiday home there. She loves the traditional town of Tryavna's authentic atmosphere and beautiful countryside, and is after a three-bedroom house for her budget of £40,000. Jonnie Irwin shows Sarah and her best friend Suzie five properties to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton meets hospital worker Sharon, who is searching for a holiday home in Torrevieja on Spain's Costa Blanca with a budget of £50,000

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats nine-month-old cockapoo Betsy, whose owners Sophie and Dan are concerned about a dragging front paw caused by nerve damage, to see if there are surgical options. But when Betsy develops gangrene, she has to have her paw amputated, and in order to salvage the rest of her limb, Noel must replace her amputated foot with a skeletally-anchored implant called a PerFiTS (Percutaneous Fixation to the Skeleton)

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The recruits go on the run across the rugged landscapes of the Inner Hebrides in a challenge designed to test their ability to evade and escape from a pursuing enemy. With limited rations and little sleep, the recruits find themselves ground down in a process where only the strongest will be able to keep going

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An on-call stroke doctor has a busy shift in the resus department, and shares his personal experiences of working on the front line during the first week of the pandemic. When a 19-year-old is treated for injuries sustained in a motorbike crash, his mother reflects on leaving her children in Colombia in search of a better life for them abroad. Other patients include a builder with an ankle injury sustained playing basketball, and a 72-year-old with a suspected stroke

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary going on the frontline with police in South Yorkshire, revealing what happens when people decide to take revenge on each other. On a Saturday night in Sheffield, police respond when a man reports that he's being attacked by his partner after she found him with a prostitute. A woman is under siege from a neighbour who claims he is sorting out neighbourhood problems by smashing cars with a hammer. And on the outskirts of Doncaster, there's a brawl outside a supermarket as three men attack someone they suspect of causing their family harm

programme.title: 21 Day Body Turnaround with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: Michael gathers the five volunteers together for a rooftop high-intensity training session with Dr Folusha Oluwajana. Meanwhile, a self-confessed 'junk food vegan' makes changes, and the group go cold-water swimming at a balmy eight degrees centigrade

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Tom Allen and Liam Charles present as the pastry chefs take part in chocolate week. First they must combine chocolate and one of Benoit Blin Blin's favourite ingredients, without any recipes to hand. Then the chefs are challenged to create mechanical chocolate showpieces, along with 48 bon bons that include a moving part, inspired by robots

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Catching up with two sets of house-hunters with different requirements. In 2010, Carole and Alan, and their daughter Lauren, were casting a wide net over Somerset and Devon. They needed a rural spot to accommodate Lauren's dog training business, as well as a home with the potential to do holiday lets to keep Carole and Alan busy. And in 2019, Ros and Hannah wanted to buy their first home together, but finding somewhere that ticked all of their boxes proved. Now they programme returns to see how both couples are getting on

programme.title: Britain's Most Luxurious Hotels
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at the Corinthia, one of London's most opulent hotels. A royal visitor leaves the staff with the very important duty of looking after her dog, while front of house director Jochem has his eyes on a new job as the hotel manager, but has to impress the managing director with his vision for the hotel

programme.title: Cook Clever, Waste Less with Prue & Rupy
programme.desc: Prue Leith and Dr Rupy Aujla help a couple who waste food by preparing back-up meals for their fussy children, putting their shopping bills to double the national average. They come up with a clever plan that could save £4000 a year - if the kids will eat it. Recipes include a crushed cornflake-coated chicken burger, a fresh Asian salad with the unlikely star ingredient of unwanted sandwich ham, and a repurposed leftover takeaway curry

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Ambles House in Northampton, where Amanda hopes her homely hospitality will win over her guests

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from Manchester compete for the cash prize of £1,000, with Sophie and Lucas, Ruth and Martin, and Ryan and Warren taking turns to try to make the best impression

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman shows five properties to Pat and David, who have been married for 44 years and are selling up in Northampton to move to Portugal's Silver Coast

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: London couple Bob and Annette Roberts have been holidaying in Grenada for 25 years and now, with retirement on the horizon, they're looking to invest £225,000 in a holiday home. Adrian Simpson shows them round a selection of what is available on the market

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Adrian Simpson shows Deborah and Peter Merritt a selection of properties for sale in Tobago. The couple downsized in the UK, and have decided to invest £300,000 in a holiday home on the breathtaking Caribbean island close to Trinidad

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Catherine Williams creates a menu inspired by South America for the first dinner party of the week in Leeds. She is joined by Garth Kirsten-Landman from South Africa, company administrator Louise Emmerson, banker Sam Appleby and property developer Diane Jones. Straight-talker Garth causes widespread offence, but the host maintains a positive mood with a painting session

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Garth Kirsten-Landman cooks kangaroo meat as he hosts the second night in Leeds. However, after his sexist jokes and inaccurate age-guessing on day one, the South African has a lot of making up to do - but things get off to a bad start when he apologises for his meal before it has even been served

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Banker Sam Appleby wears a Henry VIII costume, complete with enormous codpiece, for his best-of-British-themed evening, as he hosts the third dinner party in Leeds. Property developer Diane's Margaret Thatcher costume causes some conflict, but there is some brief harmony when a busker arrives to lead the guests in singing a Beatles song

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Company administrator Louise Emmerson serves a Mediterranean menu inspired by her former mother-in-law, featuring Madrid chicken and aubergine bake. However, the guests are not impressed by the food, and Sam Appleby stokes the simmering feud between Diane Jones and the host, much to the shock of the other diners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Property developer Diane Jones hosts the final dinner party in Leeds, and her guests have high expectations for the evening. She rustles up Greek filo pastries and cod in Italian sauce as well as entertaining her diners with Brazilian dancing on the lawn, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiello's in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owner's fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partner's parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: The Supervet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Richard and Harriet Secular pride themselves on their high-end rooms at the Royal George in Tintern in Monmouthshire - and the guests are not disappointed, with plenty of praise for the hosts throughout the two days. Will the feedback mirror their experience?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Brighton - Pete and Jason, Chris and Barb, and Debbie and Richard - host dinner parties as they compete for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps Irene Evans search for a home in western Andalusia, Spain, within commuting distance of Gibraltar, where she hopes to find work as a paralegal. She has decided to leave the UK after a tumultuous few years and has a budget of £90,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin shows Jill and Philip Hefford a selection of properties that fall within their £125,000 budget in Clearwater, Florida, where the couple want to buy a decent-sized home for Philip's daughter that can double-up as a winter-time holiday home for themselves

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Water-feature builder Geoff Carter holds the first dinner party of the week in Warrington, Cheshire, and opts for an Asian-themed menu. His guests are science teacher Emma Hoyle, call centre manager Stephen Robinson, beef farmer Alison Davies and Greek teacher Linda Weaver - who upstages the host by trying to fool the other diners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Call centre manager Stephen Robinson hosts the second night in Warrington, Cheshire, as guests are asked to dress appropriately for his pink and black theme. After a mishap with the main course, Stephen hopes his choral entertainment and raspberry Bakewell slice will be able to rescue the evening and put him in the running for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beef farmer Alison Davies serves her guests Dyffd, one of her own Hereford cows, as part of her menu for the third dinner party in Warrington, Cheshire. She shows her fellow competitors round her property, but Linda Weaver has an accident in the duck pond

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Science teacher Emma Hoyle hosts the fourth dinner party in Warrington. Both the pili pili prawn starter and the chicken main course prove a success with the other contestants, and a soak in Emma's hot tub at the end of the meal seems to round off the evening perfectly

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Linda Weaver hosts the final night of the culinary competition in Warrington, Cheshire, inviting her fellow diners to a fancy-dress party with a multicultural theme. programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: DIY fanatic Fiona contends with sub-zero temperatures as she sets out to renovate a chateau bedroom for her daughter, who is due to visit in two months, while new owners Erin and JB aim to transform the first floor of their property's south wing

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas tries to find the perfect place for Tony and Carol, who have been married for 40 years and are looking for their dream holiday home in the Spanish town of Sucina

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Kamlesh and Sukhwinder have been married for 42 years, and now their four children have flown the nest, wish to buy a winter home in southern Alicante, with its breathtaking views of the Mediterranean Sea and lively atmosphere. Jean Johansson shows them five properties for their £95,000 budget, but whether any will take their fancy remains to be seen

programme.title: The Predator (2018)
programme.desc: When a young boy accidentally signals the galaxy's most lethal hunters who set course for Earth, an eclectic band of former soldiers and a scientist attempt to prevent the end of the human race. Director Shane Black's fourth entry in the sci-fi thriller saga, starring Boyd Holbrook, Trevante Rhodes, Jacob Tremblay, Keegan-Michael Key and Olivia Munn

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The recruits go on the run across the rugged landscapes of the Inner Hebrides in a challenge designed to test their ability to evade and escape from a pursuing enemy. programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox and Professor David Wilson, one of Britain's leading criminologists, investigate famous unsolved murder cases. Thirteen-year-old David Spencer and 11-year-old Patrick Warren went missing in Birmingham on Boxing Day in 1996. To this day, no one has been charged with the double disappearance and murder of the two friends, and their bodies have never been found despite two major police investigations and a missing persons campaign that featured the boys' pictures on milk cartons. But now, Emilia and David discover new evidence leading to a prime suspect

programme.title: Britain's Most Luxurious Hotels

programme.title: Before We Die
programme.desc: Stefan discovers that Christian has been meeting with Hannah and tells Davor that they have a police informant in their midst, giving away information about the Mimica family's criminal activities. Christian has a cover story - but will it be enough to convince Davor of his innocence? Crime thriller, starring Lesley Sharp, Patrick Gibson, Petar Cvirn and Toni Gojanovic

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Two expats buy the bar they discovered on their honeymoon 21 years before, while a tattooist moonlights as both a reggae singer and a DIY visual artist. A Scottish couple bought a bargain Segway business, but making it work takes a lot of hard graft

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi visits Horley near Gatwick to help Quasim, the owner, improve his ailing Surrey guesthouse. With 13 other B&Bs all battling for the same trade, he is struggling to make the monthly repayments. Alex can see the potential in Quasim's business, but curbing his expensive tastes to maximise profits turns out to be far from easy

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Oxford litter-picker Gary is shocked when he discovers the biggest collection of used hypodermic needles yet in one of the city's clandestine drug dens, while Walsall assembles a crack clean-up crew to sift through a mound of flytipped rubbish for clues to who dumped it

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: North Yorkshire's road crime team chases a gang stealing 4x4s from industrial estates every night, while West Yorkshire traffic cops pursue stolen vehicles across Bradford. In Leeds, a 19-year-old risks running across a busy road to meet his girlfriend and the resulting incident requires the full range of emergency services - including an air ambulance - to be deployed to try to save his life

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: North Yorkshire is considered a soft touch by criminals, who using the county's rural back roads to operate under cover of darkness. In this edition, the team's elite officers hunt down and arrest burglars, drug dealers and thieves. Jamie Theakston narrates

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Car thieves steal a BMW and as they lead officers in a high speed chase across north London their attempts to escape become more and more desperate. Another driver is spotted swerving across the motorway, and the Interceptors find him to be four times over the drink driving limit. Meanwhile, a group of teenagers is pulled over for a routine stop-and-search, and found to be armed and ready for any encounter

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers pursue international car thieves as they try to leave the country in a stolen BMW, and police chase a drink-driver through Epping Forest. In Southend, burglary suspects fleeing back to London find themselves surrounded by multiple interceptor units

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The unit's hi-tech helicopter is called on to help pursue a motorcyclist riding at speeds of up to 130mph and showing no sign of slowing down for oncoming traffic or police cars. A petrol thief risks danger when trying to destroy evidence, and an officer tests the latest weapon in the fight against crime - a Subaru Impreza STi

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall treats a rescue dog that steals food and barks at the front door - but finds the training techniques for one problem do not work quite as well with the other. Elsewhere, a Jack Russell with strong reactions to traffic makes going for a walk a potentially lethal experience, and two akitas have an aggressive dislike of all other dogs, which the owners fear may turn violent

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Ned and Sheila think that by concentrating on work they will forget their feelings. Levi's romantic gesture piques Bea's guilt

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Alf, Irene and Marilyn share their concerns over Justin's erratic behaviour. Dean finds a drunk Mackenzie holed up at the motel, and after harsh words, they become closer

programme.title: Sinkholes: Buried Underground
programme.desc: The personal stories of people who were almost killed by these natural phenomena, which can swallow streets, rip up motorways and even drag unfortunate bystanders to their deaths

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces out on the road and in the air to discover how CCTV and technological advances are being used to fight crime. Footage includes some residents taking neighbourhood watch to the next level, a group of thugs caught wrongdoing on a housing estate and a pensioner using her walking stick to defend herself against an intruder

programme.title: Husbands from Hell
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on partners who give their wives grief, including Alan in Oxfordshire who turned the family garden into a scrapyard and just cannot stop buying cars - 120 of them at the last count. Jane from Dunfermline has ended up with a Mr Bean lookalike for a husband thanks to her partner Bill, while opera singer Nicky in Bury has to put up with her husband's obsession with cleaning the house at the crack of dawn

programme.title: My Lover My Killer
programme.desc: The case of Ian Paton, a man with a history of violence sought to start a family with his on-off girlfriend, but fatherhood was not enough to curb his anger

programme.title: Halloween H20 (1998)
programme.desc: Homicidal madman Michael Myers returns to stalk his original target, now an alcoholic teacher, 20 years after his first killing spree, and ends up terrorising a group of teenagers in a deserted school. Horror sequel, starring Jamie Lee Curtis, Janet Leigh, Josh Hartnett and Michelle Williams

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary following travellers' constant struggle to co-exist with settled communities. Carol and her family cannot understand why her community is so hated and vilified, while local man Arthur is on a mission to understand what brings the travellers into parks and public areas - and Carol's caravan is his first stop. Johnny and his family live in a chalet in Essex but his non-traveller wife Andrea has had enough of feeling ostracised and wants to move back into a normal house

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: At Tencreek holiday park in Looe, Cornwall, new Yellow Coats Charley and Andi make their debuts as park mascots Deano and Sparky, while trouble in the toilet block puts park manager Rob in the firing line from an irate customer. Over in Somerset, Holiday Resort Unity's head of catering Sharon has to turn around the park's new burger joint in record time

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall's casebook starts with a broken bond between two best friends. Cairn terrier Ted has turned on his owner Mike after having a stroke and now Mike can't even cross his front room without Ted attacking him. Can Graeme help them pave the way back to friendship? There's a little girl's best friend, who is perfect at home, but a nightmare in the neighbourhood, leaving mum Jess so stressed out with his bad behaviour that if things don't change, she wants to rehome him

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Ned and Sheila think that by concentrating on work they will forget their feelings. Levi's romantic gesture piques Bea's guilt

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Chris and Gary have decided to change everything for a new life in Spain, arriving with just two suitcases, a hotel for a few nights and £3,500. But having never been to Benidorm before, could their dream turn into a nightmare? Scotsman Graham has hit upon the idea of selling organised pub crawls, while another Graham - the drivetime DJ at Fresh Radio - faces a dilemma when he is offered his old job back, which would mean spending less time with girlfriend Jackie

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi is called to the Gipsy Hill Hotel in Exeter, where owner Grace has plans to retire and hand the business to her daughter Jackie, who currently manages the hotel. But profits are falling and Grace worries there will be no business to pass down. Alex immediately spots that the hotel is stuck in the past, with its old-fashioned decor. Can she convince the owner to release her grip on the purse strings and allow her daughter to take ownership now?

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Anna and John have to work hard to get to the root of an almighty blockage threatening to send a tsunami of waste gushing into a bungalow. In Lewes, East Sussex, after one of the biggest bonfire night celebrations in the country, filth fighters reveal the trade secrets of clearing up the mess left by the 80,000 revellers

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: In this edition officers have to deal with the consequences of cars hitting cyclists and pedestrians. In York, traffic cops need all their professionalism to deal with a distressing situation when a pregnant bike rider is knocked off her bike by a lorry, while a pedestrian in Leeds has been hit by a driver who appears to have used their car as a weapon. But does CCTV footage show the whole story? Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers are led on a chase through Bradford as they pursue a car stolen in Manchester by teenagers, while burglars who have been targeting pensioners are spotted in Halifax. Meanwhile in North Yorkshire, members of the road crime team have their hands full tracking thieves operating in a convoy of cars who steal from builders' vans in hotel and pub car parks. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The police dog unit is called into action to chase a thief seen trying to break into a lorry, and the pursuit of a Range Rover leads the interceptors to a haul of stolen prestige cars. A seized Lamborghini brings out the team's competitive streak, and the presence of an intruder puts the station on full alert

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Memorable moments from the series, including the pursuit of two knife-wielding robbers endangering both themselves and the public in a stolen Toyota. The officers also use a mixture of technology and old-fashioned legwork to chase a drug dealer whose number plate flashes up a warning

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The officers in Essex are called on to take drastic action when a pursuit from London arrives in their area. A car thief is forced to face the consequences of his actions, and a drug search in Basildon yields curious discoveries

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall helps to train two dogs that go overboard in protecting the family home and possessions, and another that is particularly protective of the owners' 18-month-old baby. Another candidate for retraining is an energetic cavapoochon who loves to run faster than its owners can handle and does not know to respond to its own name

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Ned and Sheila C refuse to act on their attraction towards each other, but he feels unable to explain the connection to Yashvi. Roxy concentrates on the volleyball tournament

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall tries to solve dog behavioural problems, using his experience to find quick but long-lasting solutions

Meanwhile at Holiday Resort Unity in Somerset, a broken pump has closed the outdoor pool, leaving a long line of disgruntled guests

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Richard and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. They begin with Lincolnshire single mum, Sam, who has dedicated her life to caring for her disabled daughter, leaving no time for cleaning

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: Travellers' constant struggle to live side by side with settled communities - from the point of view of both sides. Twenty-one-year-old traveller Georgia, settled with her own beauty business, realises she will need help from her family, and Warwickshire resident Jo sets out to find evidence of animal cruelty in traveller camps

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Bar manager Chris and hairdresser Gary have only been in Benidorm a week, but they have already found the perfect apartment and are now looking for work. But Chris has something else on his mind, which involves asking his boyfriend a special question. The documentary also catches up with Linda, who runs a dog rescue charity, and introduces Bradford-born Chris, who has turned his love of buying-and-selling into opening an antique and second-hand furniture shop

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi travels to the French Pyrenees, where ex-pats Mike and Joss invested everything they had into creating a holiday retreat and a beautiful family home for themselves and their two young boys. But despite the fabulous setting, the hotel's bookings are poor and with their savings dwindling, the couple are desperate not to take another wrong turn. Can Alex get them back on the right track?

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Midlands-based pest exterminators Chris and Mark take on some elusive mice causing havoc in an unexpected location, while in Buckinghamshire, a lorry load of potentially hazardous waste is dumped by the side of a main road, and boss David suspects it could be linked to organised crime

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers have their hands full over the festive period as party-going drunks end up getting behind the wheel, while the stresses of surviving Christmas lead to late night argy-bargy and screaming matches. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A fire extinguisher is launched from a fleeing getaway car. An insight into the working life of officers patrolling Britain's roads

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Members of Essex's high-speed police interception unit chase a lorry driver across three counties. Elsewhere, the team's adapted vehicles are pushed to speeds of up to 115mph while in pursuit of a joyrider. The officers also get the chance to hone their skills with the Subaru World Rally team

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The high-speed police interception unit pursues a stolen car through the suburbs of Essex until the thieves turn into a cul-de-sac and, though seemingly trapped, still try to escape. Elsewhere, officers deal with a fight outside a nightclub and tackle boy racers in Southend

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Members of Essex's high-speed police interception unit pursue a stolen BMW X5, and the Stanway team gives two unsuspecting car thieves an early morning wake-up call. Elsewhere, officers discover a vehicle that has been turned into a four-wheeled petrol bomb, and a road-tax evader encounters trouble with the law

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: A rescue dog from Romania presents Graeme Hall with one of his toughest challenges - since it is afraid of men, it is impossible for him to get anywhere near it. The second assignment involves a Jack Russell with a volatile and unpredictable temper, and finally, Graeme deals with a labrador cross that is afraid of travelling in cars, which the owner fears may cause an accident

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Roxy demands answers from Terese, and Toadie confides in Karl and Susan about his uncertainty over how things will progress with Melanie once they go public

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ryder and Chloe struggle with their unemployment, Alf is losing his patience, and Nikau would rather be at home than at a lavish post-photoshoot party

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: John and Barry, known as duo Dragtastic, get to work repairing dozens of outfits, while also dealing with their respective day jobs of cooking and teaching. Elsewhere, pensioners Ray and Christine try to adapt to the high summer heat, while ARCH horse charity founder Jill races to the rescue of a neglected white stallion

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: When the red phone rings in the A&E department of Barnsley Hospital, staff rush to help a woman who has arrived in an ambulance and is struggling to breathe. Former showbiz pianist Terry (84), comes in with a badly broken ankle and the fear he may never dance again

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A man is rushed in with horrific head and neck wounds after being attacked with a machete, and as the medics fight to stabilise him, his blood pressure drops and they need to take urgent action. The doctors also treat a motorbike racer who was injured during his last event before retirement, and a 17-year-old who fell on his head from a substantial height

programme.title: Critical Surgery: Changing Lives
programme.desc: The second of two documentaries about the work of volunteer medics performing reconstructive facial surgery in Ethiopia. Twenty-year-old Hulu Sintayehu, from the poorest region of Addis Ababa in Ethiopia, has a tumour growing into the side of her neck, deep into her blood vessels. The surgeons from Facing Africa have not seen this type of tumour before, presenting them with a highly complicated operation - and if they run out of anything, they have no spares, so they have to think on their feet and come up with a plan B

programme.title: Babies 24/7: Maternity Ward
programme.desc: Documentary series based around Royal Preston Hospital. A dance teacher is desperate to have a water birth after suffering post-natal depression with her first child

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: A disparate group of young sex workers reveal what life is really like trying to make a living as escorts, cammers and sex entrepreneurs. The film explores why these young women decided to 'stop giving it away for free', revealing in the process how materialism has collided with a new age of sexual pragmatism

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica decides to get away from it all and sets off on what is supposed to be a relaxing Caribbean cruise - until the murder of a fellow passenger presents her with a fresh mystery to solve. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The shooting of a petty officer looks like an open-and-shut case when a Russian man is found with a recently fired gun in his car. However, the investigation takes a dramatic turn when it is revealed he is working as a spy for the Department of Homeland Security. Military crime drama, with Mark Harmon, Cote de Pablo and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a lance corporal, whose body has been found in an empty house, and discovers he had a number of spurned lovers and a $2million inheritance. Ducky and Gibbs interview one of the dead marine's partners, but disagree over whether she is telling the truth. David McCallum and Mark Harmon star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The admissions director of an exclusive Manhattan elementary school is bludgeoned to death and Briscoe and Green initially believe she was murdered by a parent determined to have their child enrolled. However, as their investigation continues, a member of the school's staff comes under suspicion. Guest starring Roger Rees, with Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the death of a Russian model, and when the autopsy reveals a host of old injuries they suspect long-term abuse. Further tests are made on the body, and the findings suggest medical malpractice may have been the cause, leading the detectives to track down the person responsible for her death. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy faces bad memories when a drunk driver kills three people - and finds himself forced to protect the perpetrator in the process. Award-winning police drama, starring Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A politician is embroiled in a triple murder, but persuading him to reveal the truth is only the first step toward unmasking a killer willing to go to any lengths to avoid capture. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An investigation into a hit-and-run leads to a property scam, but Green, Rubirosa and Lupo's undercover work takes a surprising twist that pits McCoy against the US Attorney's office. January Jones (Mad Men) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The fatal stabbing of a psychologist draws Briscoe and Curtis into a heated divorce case and pits McCoy and Ross against a manipulative attorney who puts results before professional ethics. Award-winning American police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Kidnappers strike on Halloween, wounding a marine sergeant and snatching his daughter - leaving the team members wondering why anyone would try to extort money from someone on such a modest salary. As the agents begin searching for a motive, Abby surprises everyone by turning up at the lab in a revealing fancy-dress costume

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team joins forces with military investigators to ascertain whether terrorists were responsible for an explosion at a golf course in which a marine colonel was killed. As inquiries proceed, McGee has to use his computer skills to break into secret government files to ensure the murderers are apprehended. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A former marine falls to his death from a hotel balcony, and investigations quickly lead to the discovery of another body. As Gibbs and the team dig deeper, they uncover evidence that points to the activities of a vice ring trafficking young girls. Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The body of an avant-garde photographer is found handcuffed to the wheel of a crashed car - and inquiries lead to the discovery of multiple murders committed by an artist trying to exorcise demons from the past through his work. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A judge's son is shot dead and his body dumped outside the courthouse shortly after a rapper receives a harsh custodial sentence. However, Logan and Wheeler soon realise the crime may have more to do with the victim's friends than the musician - with an old-fashioned playing card placed on the corpse a vital clue to the killer's identity. Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the murder of a surgeon who provided deaf patients with controversial cochlear implants. After ruling out the involvement of a rival doctor, the detectives suspect a radical deaf playwright may be responsible for the crime. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A pregnant Muslim student is murdered, and initial inquiries suggest the crime was prompted by her efforts to break up a clash between two ethnic groups. However, Logan and Wheeler later learn the victim was secretly dating an Italian-American against the wishes of her parents, who had organised an arranged marriage - and as they investigate the animosity between the two families, more blood is shed

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A woman and her date are murdered in her apartment while enjoying a romantic evening in. Though Goren and Eames initially suspect the married father of her 18-month-old daughter, they soon begin to believe that members of her rich family were involved in the crime - and may have killed before. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star, with Doris Roberts and Richard Kind

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When a seductive conman is killed, Castle and Beckett must investigate New York's elite. Meanwhile, Castle plans to surprise Beckett on their one-year wedding anniversary

Ty Burrell (Modern Family) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green have their hands full investigating four homicides, including the killing of a husband by his distraught wife and the murder of a woman who had a complex relationship with two brothers. They then have to look into the abduction of an expectant mother. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Ross investigate when a restaurant becomes the scene of a shooting, and discover one of the diners is concealing a desire for revenge. Unfortunately, the object of their suspicion has a clever defence already up her sleeve - and only an expert witness can break her story. Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A riot at an immigration rally in Central Park ends in murder, and the political climate forces McCoy to assign a special prosecutor, who starts to increase tensions in the office with his anti-establishment attitude. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity leads Green and Lupo to suspect an innocent doctor has been murdered in place of a killer's true target, a physician who administered a botched lethal injection in South Carolina. Police drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate when a student is shot dead after a party gets out of control. The victim's boyfriend is arrested, but the officers later receive a tip-off about someone else - a vengeful youth deliberately infecting girls with HIV. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee tries to help his sister, who believes she may have murdered someone - but is too traumatised and disorientated to remember exactly what happened. As the team investigates the connected case of a sailor's death, Tony and Abby find themselves distracted by relationship problems. Drama, starring Sean Murray, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Two FBI agents try to seize control of the team's investigation into the discovery of a perfectly preserved body hidden in a chimney at a marine base. Reluctant to be ousted from the case, Gibbs agrees to work with them - and learns the victim was a serial killer responsible for the deaths of 14 people. Meanwhile, McGee's literary efforts lead to discord with the others

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team tries to find out who was responsible for sabotaging a robotic vehicle that caused the death of a Navy lieutenant and almost killed Abby. Meanwhile, Ziva's suspicions are aroused by the discovery that Tony is repeatedly visiting the hospital. Drama, starring Pauley Perrette, Michael Weatherly, Cote de Pablo and Mark Harmon

programme.title: The Green Mile (1999)
programme.desc: A convicted child-killer of towering height and massive build is condemned to death row, but astonishes the guards with his good nature and miraculous healing powers. They believe the gentle giant is incapable of crime, and emotions run high as they realise there is no hope of overturning his death sentence. programme.desc: Two FBI agents try to seize control of the team's investigation into the discovery of a perfectly preserved body hidden in a chimney at a marine base.
