Meanwhile, McGee's literary efforts lead to discord with the others

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team tries to find out who was responsible for sabotaging a robotic vehicle that caused the death of a Navy lieutenant and almost killed Abby. Meanwhile, Ziva's suspicions are aroused by the discovery that Tony is repeatedly visiting the hospital. Drama, starring Pauley Perrette, Michael Weatherly, Cote de Pablo and Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green question a comedian in connection with the death of his adopted child, and uncover allegations that he molested an 11-year-old boy years previously. Reopening the case, they investigate a tangled tale of greed, deceit and broken trust involving the alleged victim's parents. Starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cyrus Lupo returns to New York after four years abroad. He and Green investigate two suicides that seem to be linked, and the detectives become suspicious of a parolee known as Dr Death. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A charity worker with a secret appetite for sordid encounters dies at the hands of a serial killer, but the defendant constructs a unique case by claiming the crime was the result of exposure to excessive violence on television. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After a teenager is found dead at a high-school party, the detectives go to great lengths to secure convictions against the two leading suspects. To complicate matters, a juror's attraction to Connie looks set to disrupt the subsequent trial. Drama, starring Alana De La Garza

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A psychotherapist is shot dead, and his wife stands trial for murder when it is revealed the man was involved in an inappropriate relationship with one of his teenage clients. However, when the widow reveals she was also one of the doctor's victims in her youth, the DA's office is forced to prove that childhood traumas are no excuse for killing someone

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate an attack on a nurse, and discover she had been moving house regularly in an effort to evade a stalker who terrorised her with distressing e-mails. The victim regains consciousness, but fails to identify her attacker, leading to the shocking revelation that she may have fabricated the assault story as a way of attracting attention

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The discovery of a dead marine intelligence officer in a motel room sets the team off on a hunt for her killer. Although the town's authorities have allegedly already investigated the crime, Gibbs is determined to conduct his own thorough inquiries - which may lead him to a terrorist cell. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine major is found dead in an underground maintenance room, having scratched out one of his own eyes - and the presence of a webcam suggests someone watched him die. The team investigates with the help of Lt Col Hollis Mann, and links the case to wanted terrorist Mamoun Sharif, an old adversary who is threatening to unleash a chemical attack

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents try to track down an arms dealer who has the launch codes for the Navy's encrypted satellite defence system and is offering them to the highest bidder. In an attempt to win the confidence of the buyer, Ducky poses as an ageing Englishman trying to sell the information. Guest starring Armand Assante, with David McCallum and Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A distraught father takes desperate measures to seek revenge for his daughter who was raped. Starring Mariska Hargitay and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A billionaire's stepson drops dead on a dance floor, the apparent victim of a deliberately administered drug overdose, and suspicion initially falls on his mother, a former stripper and model - but she too is later killed. Drama, starring Chris Noth, with Kristy Swanson and Arrested Development's David Cross

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames discover a scrapbook belonging to a serial killer on death row, the contents of which suggest he may have claimed more victims than was previously thought. Goren later learns the murderer may have a link to his mother - but has only two weeks to learn the nature of the connection before the execution takes place. Guest starring Roy Scheider (Jaws) and Rita Moreno (West Side Story)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The members of an evangelical church close ranks to protect their leader, an influential preacher whose wife has been found dead. As Goren struggles to find her killer, he is distracted by fears over his mother's worsening health - and an encounter with his estranged brother. Guest starring Tom Arnold

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan pledges to discover who administered a lethal dose of radioactive polonium to a dying friend, but later learns Ross is being pressured to drop the case. Suspecting that powerful Israeli interests are trying to curtail his investigation, he vows to continue - but a second fatality complicates matters. Drama, starring Christopher Noth and Eric Bogosian

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett and Castle investigate when a body is found in the theatre staging Martha's latest show, leading them into the unexpectedly dangerous world of competitive a cappella

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The author takes the stand as the key witness in a murder trial, but then new info emerges late in the case, leading him and Beckett to rush to prevent a miscarriage of justice. Detective drama, starring Nathan Fillion and Stana Katic

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV is helping to bring criminals using weapons to justice. A CCTV operator's instincts lead him to keep an eye on a man acting suspiciously on a train station platform and who then takes a knife out of his pocket and threatens a woman coming towards him. There is also footage of a raid on a west London jewellery shop, with the gang spraying bleach in the eyes of security guards and smashing down the doors with pickaxes while the terrified staff cower inside

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh, a student at Kew in the 1970s, offers an insight into the work carried out behind the scenes by the 150 gardening staff at the Royal Botanic Gardens. programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Expert in foul odours Dr Geoffrey Kite eagerly anticipates the rare flowering of the mighty Titan arum, an evil-smelling bloom lasting just 24 hours. Simon and Tim Cole work against the clock to complete the badger sett and field hospital in time for Kew's Go Wild festival

programme.title: It's All Happening (1963)
programme.desc: A talent spotter at a record company discovers that the orphanage he grew up in is facing closure. programme.title: The Wipers Times
programme.desc: In the bombed-out ruins of the Belgian town of Ypres in 1916, Captain Fred Roberts and Lieutenant Jack Pearson discover a printing press and decide to start a satirical newspaper to raise the spirits of the British troops. It proves hugely popular with the men in the trenches - but their superior officers see it as an act of insubordination and subversion and call for a ban. Feature-length factual drama by Ian Hislop and Nick Newman, starring Ben Chaplin, Julian Rhind-Tutt, Michael Palin and Emilia Fox

programme.title: Assassin for Hire (1951)
programme.desc: An assassin who kills to finance his violinist brother's career is tricked into confessing his crimes by a wily police inspector. Drama, starring Sydney Tafler, Ronald Howard, Katherine Blake and John Hewer

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Keeper of the fern collection Steve Ketley searches for a new home for his consignment of giant moth cocoons, while John Dransfield, a leading authority on Madagascan palms, undertakes one last mission to his favourite destination before retiring, only to find that a species believed to be facing extinction appears to have vanished altogether

programme.desc: Villagers in a remote English village eagerly help a large group of Allied troops billeted in their town, but when they realise the soldiers are disguised German paratroopers acting as the vanguard of an invasion, they must pull together to thwart the enemy. Second World War drama, directed by Alberto Cavalcanti and based on a story by Graham Greene, starring Leslie Banks, Basil Sydney, Mervyn Johns and Marie Lohr

programme.title: Escape from Sobibor (1987)
programme.desc: New arrivals at a Nazi concentration camp realise they do not have long to live as the Nazi campaign of genocide gathers speed. The commandant threatens to execute one prisoner for every escape attempt - leading the inmates to realise that the only hope is for all 600 of them to break out together. Drama based on the true story of the largest uprising during the Holocaust, starring Alan Arkin, Joanna Pacula and Rutger Hauer

programme.title: The Exception (2016)

Drama, starring Lily James, Jai Courtney and Christopher Plummer

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: England v New Zealand. All the action from day one of the series-concluding Second Test at Edgbaston. England haven't won a test series against New Zealand since 2013, with the visitors winning two of the last three series since then. The previous two series between the sides have finished 1-0 to the Kiwi's, with those two wins giving Kane Williamson's team their only victories this century. If the away side were to succeed in this series, it would be England's first home series defeat for seven years since their 1-0 defeat against Sri Lanka.

England haven't won a test series against New Zealand since 2013, with the visitors winning two of the last three series since then. The previous two series between the sides have finished 1-0 to the Kiwi's, with those two wins giving Kane Williamson's team their only victories this century. If the away side were to succeed in this series, it would be England's first home series defeat for seven years since their 1-0 defeat against Sri Lanka.
